_comment: First consumer of the RecurrenceTemplate substrate. Shadow shape per CTO scope §'Migration Path For Existing Jobs' #1. To promote from shadow to live, POST this template via the manager API, run runMaterializationTickOnce, verify the next-3-fires match the bespoke Sunday weekly log schedule, then disable the bespoke trigger.
title: Sunday weekly product log
description: Weekly product log compiled by Maestra from the roadmap + delivery-log + agent activity. Delivered Sunday morning.
